name: lock-release rejects a release call whose owner does not match the current lockfile owner
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/locks && printf 'owner=pid-1\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/locks/rule_cache.lock && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/lock-release.sh" --section rule_cache --owner pid-2 --lock-dir .claude-tdd-pro/locks 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'owner_mismatch' err.txt && [ -f .claude-tdd-pro/locks/rule_cache.lock ] && echo blocked 1>&2
